ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the exam is associated with */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam (e.g., CLEP Financial Accounting) */,
  "pass_score" INTEGER /* Minimum score required to pass the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., Midterm, Final, Quiz) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who took the exam */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date when the exam was taken */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor on the student's performance */,
  "retake_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is allowed to retake the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
